design_philosophy.visual_style: Organic & Earthy (Archetype 1) mixed with Vibrant Play
design_philosophy.key_principle: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Community App' warmth with 'Emergency Response' clarity.

secondary.name: Safety Teal
secondary.usage: Secondary buttons, Trust badges, Success states

buttons.primary: h-12 px-8 bg-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-600 text-white font-bold rounded-full shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: h-12 px-8 bg-white border-2 border-stone-200 text-stone-700 font-bold rounded-full hover:border-stone-400 hover:bg-stone-50 transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-stone-500 hover:text-stone-900 font-medium hover:bg-stone-100 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-100 p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.missing_child: relative overflow-hidden bg-white rounded-3xl border-2 border-stone-100 hover:border-amber-200 transition-all group

inputs.base: h-14 bg-stone-50 border-2 border-stone-200 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-amber-500/20 rounded-xl px-4 text-lg transition-all placeholder:text-stone-400

badges.missing: bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.found: bg-teal-100 text-teal-700 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.confidence: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise texture overlay on the main background (opacity 0.03) to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.blobs: Place large, blurred (blur-3xl) colored orbs (amber-200, teal-200) behind the main hero section to create a 'warm glow'.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use 'Lucide React' icons. Style them with `stroke-width={2.5}` for a friendly, robust look.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use `backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/50` for sticky headers and floating search bars.

hero_main.alt: Happy diverse children playing in a park
hero_main.usage: Hero section background or main visual

community_support.usage: About section or 'How it works' visual

background_texture.usage: Subtle background for footer or call-to-action section (use with heavy overlay)

home.layout: Split Hero or Centered Focus. Two massive cards: 'I have seen a child' (Search) vs 'I lost a child' (Register).
home.visuals: Use the 'Hero Glow' gradient. Make the 'Search' action the most prominent element.

register.layout: Single column, focused form. Remove distractions. Use a 'Progress Bar' if multi-step.
register.tone: Calm, supportive. Use micro-copy like 'We are here to help' instead of just 'Submit'.

search.layout: Drag and drop zone must be large and friendly. Use an illustration or icon of a camera/photo.
search.results: Grid layout. If match found: Highlight with Green/Teal. If no match: Gentle grey state with 'Report to authorities' fallback.

accessibility_checklist.contrast: Ensure Amber-500 text is not used on white backgrounds (too low contrast). Use Amber-600 or Stone-900 for text.
accessibility_checklist.focus_states: Visible focus rings (ring-4 ring-amber-200) are mandatory.
accessibility_checklist.labels: All inputs must have visible labels. No placeholder-only inputs.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: DO NOT use dark mode. Force light mode in tailwind config if needed.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings. Import it in index.css.
Avoid sharp corners. Use `rounded-2xl` minimum for containers.
Use the provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.
Make the 'Upload' area feel like a 'Safe Drop Zone' - use dashed borders with warm colors.
